filledFields.value: I am excited to apply for the Software Engineer, AI Solutions(Contarct-12 Months) role at Jobs, where I can bring my JavaScript, React, Next.js experience as an aspiring Software Engineer.

filledFields.value: My background in JavaScript, React, Next.js, Node.js closely matches the expectations in this job description.
